steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: To the left of the blank: the end of a dependent clause. To the right: the start of an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the comma rule for introductory dependent clauses
steps.content:
A comma separates an introductory dependent clause from the independent clause that follows.

Choice C correctly places this comma after lifelike.

The wrong choices either omit the comma or add a redundant but after the dependent clause.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
